keyFeatures.en: Customizable templates for various content types
keyFeatures.zh: 多种内容类型的可定制模板

description.en: No limitations on usage, but ads are added to generated videos
description.zh: 无使用限制，但生成的视频中会添加广告

description.en: No ads in generated videos, higher quality output
description.zh: 生成的视频中无广告，输出质量更高

description.en: Advanced features, dedicated support, and custom branding
description.zh: 高级功能，专属支持和自定义品牌

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for advanced users
weaknesses.zh: 高级用户自定义选项有限

weaknesses.en: Dependent on AI accuracy for content generation
weaknesses.zh: 内容生成依赖于AI的准确性

targetAudience.en: Marketers, content creators, and businesses looking to automate video production
targetAudience.zh: 营销人员、内容创作者和希望自动化视频生产的业务

positioning.en: A cost-effective solution for businesses to create high-quality videos without the need for manual editing
positioning.zh: 为企业提供一种成本效益高的解决方案，无需手动编辑即可创建高质量的视频
